title: 阿斯麦与塔塔电子达成合作，推进印度芯片计划
content: 阿斯麦控股与塔塔电子签署合作协议，旨在发展印度本土芯片制造能力。阿斯麦技术将支持塔塔电子在古吉拉特邦建设的 300 毫米半导体晶圆厂，该厂投资 110 亿美元，旨在生产应用于汽车、移动设备和 AI 领域的半导体。该合作契合印度政府目标，双方还将合作培养人才、发展供应链及研发基础设施，谅解备忘录签署于印度总理莫迪访问荷兰期间。 阿斯麦控股 与 塔塔电子 签署合作协议，旨在发展印度本土芯片制造能力。 阿斯麦 技术将支持塔塔电子在古吉拉特邦建设的 300 毫米半导体晶圆厂，该厂投资 110 亿美元，旨在生产应用于汽车、移动设备和 AI 领域的半导体。该合作契合 印度政府 目标，双方还将合作培养人才、发展供应链及研发基础设施，谅解备忘录签署于印度总理 莫迪 访问荷兰期间。 2026-05-17 阿斯麦与塔塔电子达成合作，推进印度芯片计划 2025-12-09 英特尔与塔塔电子签署备忘录，探索实现印度所需芯片制造与封测本地化 2025-04-07 印度塔塔电子招募前格芯亚洲区总裁洪启财，后者将主管半导体制造 2024-09-27 塔塔电子、力积电达成技术转让协议，将合作建设印度首座晶圆厂 2023-12-13 阿斯麦与三星电子将共同投资 7 亿欧元在韩国建芯片研究中心 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

normalizedTitle: 阿斯麦与塔塔电子达成合作 推进印度芯片计划
scoreReasoning: 全球半导体供应链关键玩家合作，标志印度芯片制造实质性突破，对芯片格局有明确影响。
summary: ASML and Tata Electronics have signed an agreement to boost India’s semiconductor production. ASML’s technology will help Tata build a 300‑mm wafer fab in Gujarat, a US$11 billion investment aimed at making chips for automotive, mobile devices and AI. The partnership aligns with India’s goal of expanding local chip manufacturing and will also collaborate on talent development, supply chain expansion and R&D infrastructure. The MoU was signed during PM Modi’s visit to the Netherlands.

title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
content: OpenAI and Dell have partnered to deploy Codex AI coding agents in hybrid and on‑premise enterprise settings. This collaboration enables secure integration of AI developers across organizational data and workflows.

title: AI超级应用正在重塑中国的互联网
content: AI “super‑apps” are reshaping China’s internet landscape by integrating multiple services—such as e‑commerce, social media, payments, and logistics—into single platforms. These comprehensive apps increase user engagement, streamline commerce, and bolster data collection, thereby accelerating digital transformation and tightening platform control across the country.

summary: AI “super‑apps” are reshaping China’s internet landscape by integrating multiple services—such as e‑commerce, social media, payments, and logistics—into single platforms. title: The Plan to Make American Crime Obsolete
content: David Ulevitch interviews Col. Jeffrey Glover and Rahul Sidhu on how AI, drones, and sensor networks are transforming public safety. The discussion highlights drone‑first responder programs, body‑camera analytics for burnout detection, brain‑scan wellness checks, and layered sensor systems that convert reactive policing into data‑driven, proactive response. They examine the challenges of deploying technology at scale, the importance of on‑the‑beat experience, and how policing skills will evolve over the next decade.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (David Ulevitch, Col. Jeffrey Glover, Rahul Sidhu)
eventKey: plan-make-american-crime-obsolete
normalizedTitle: the plan to make american crime obsolete
representativeSources: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (David Ulevitch, Col. Jeffrey Glover, Rahul Sidhu)
scoreReasoning: a16z podcast对话，讨论AI、无人机如何改变公共安全。来自知名机构，主题与AI社会应用和监管趋势相关。
summary: David Ulevitch interviews Col. Jeffrey Glover and Rahul Sidhu on how AI, drones, and sensor networks are transforming public safety. The discussion highlights drone‑first responder programs, body‑camera analytics for burnout detection, brain‑scan wellness checks, and layered sensor systems that convert reactive policing into data‑driven, proactive response. They examine the challenges of deploying technology at scale, the importance of on‑the‑beat experience, and how policing skills will evolve over the next decade.

title: 你对 LLM 的评估体系会失效，而你甚至不会察觉
content: 刚从 Deepmind 离职的工程师 Lun Wang 发表关于大模型性能评估的文章：《你对 LLM 的评估体系会失效，而你甚至不会察觉》。 我们擅长评估已经存在的模型，却极不擅长评估即将构建的模型——尤其是当模型跨越到新的能力阶段时。大多数基准测试…

title: 麻省理工团队开源 GenCAD，用一张图片生成完整 CAD 模型与参数化程序

title: 巴西分析师因通胀压力上调2026年关键利率预期
content: Experts in Brazil have revised upward their forecast for the 2026 policy rate, citing ongoing inflationary pressure. The new estimate signals a higher benchmark interest rate for that year than previously projected. This adjustment reflects the central bank’s response to persistent price increases and aims to maintain monetary stability.
